takeaways: If accurate and adopted, aggregated deployments could create new localized load pockets — utilities and grid planners should monitor for concentrated residential/edge AI demand.

Security and operational reliability risks arise from colocating GPU compute on consumer connections; coordination between hosts, providers and utilities is required.
